findings.suggestion: rewrite the sentence whole, and ask first whether the clause the dash carries earns its place at all; the dash is often hanging fluff, and a comma or semicolon in its slot only keeps the fluff. Keep the few asides that earn the break.

'leverage': 10 uses; the limit is 1
findings.suggestion: say what the actor does: uses, applies, borrows against, builds on. The one allowed use is the finance term of art (a leveraged position, a leverage ratio).
